area: Pre-commit residue ownership under multi-claim parallelism
finding: `resolveResidueTaskId` ignored `ATM_COMMIT_TASK_ID` and fell back to a single-active-lock heuristic, so with two captains (multiple active locks) every governance artifact resolved to "no active task ownership" and every governed commit was blocked. Foreign in-flight evidence also blocked unconditionally.
expectedBehavior: The committing task id from the wrapper is the primary ownership context; a foreign governance artifact with a live direction lock or live ledger claim is in-flight parallel work and passes; orphaned artifacts stay fail-closed.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced live on 2026-07-12/13 with claude-fable-5 and codex-backlog-captain working the same tree; commits deadlocked until the fix.
followUp: Keep a two-claim regression: foreign manifest with active owner passes, orphaned manifest blocks.
